title: RAG + D7 evaluation golden query set
description: Versioned ground truth for Spike-1 retrieval evaluation. See docs/backlog/2026-05-27-rag-d7-eval-harness-design.md §3.

version.description: Semantic version of this golden set. Bump when queries or expected_*_pages change.

expected_path.description: A=user KB only; B=D7 platform SOP only; both=fusion case; neither=NoAnswer ground truth

expected_kb_pages.description: Ground truth ab_kb_chunk/document pids or kb_pids. Empty for expected_path=B|neither.

expected_d7_pages.description: Ground truth D7 page ids (e.g. compiled.playbook.command-delivery-workflow). Empty for expected_path=A|neither.

tags.description: Subject tags for per-tag metric aggregation

notes.description: Why this is ground truth — must be human-readable for review
